back_translation: Paul, an apostle of Jesus Christ according to the command of God our Savior, and of Jesus Christ who is our hope
To Timothy, a true son in the faith. May grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father, and from Jesus Christ our Lord, remain with you
As I urged you when I was about to go to the region of Macedonia, to remain in the city of Ephesus, in order to charge certain people not to teach deviantly
And not to give attention to myths and endless genealogies, which these things promote disputatious inquiry rather than the work of God which proceeds by faith
But the aim of this charge is love, that comes from a pure heart, a good conscience, and faith that is unhypocritical
Some have missed these things and have veered into empty talk
They want to be teachers of the law, but they do not understand either what they say or the matter they confidently affirm
But we know that the law is good, if anyone uses it correctly

Knowing this, that the law is not laid down for the righteous person, but for the lawless and the rebellious, the impious and sinners, the wicked and those who profane the sacred, killers of fathers and killers of mothers, murderers
Sexually immoral persons, men who have sex with men, slave-traders, liars, false-swearers, and anyone who does what is contrary to correct teaching
According to the gospel of the glory of God who is praiseworthy, with which I have been entrusted to keep
I give thanks to Jesus Christ our Lord, who has strengthened me, because He considered me faithful and appointed me to the work of service
Formerly, I was a blasphemer, a persecutor, and an arrogant person; but I received mercy, because I did so in ignorance and in unbelief
And the grace of our Lord overflowed upon me, together with the faith and love that are in Jesus Christ
This saying is trustworthy and worthy of full acceptance, namely: Jesus Christ came into the world to save sinners — among those sinners, I am the first
But for this very reason I received mercy, so that in me, the first sinner, Jesus Christ might display all His patience, as an example to all those who would come to believe in Him for eternal life
Now, may honor and glory be to the King who is eternal, who is incorruptible, who is invisible, the God who is unique, forever and ever. Amen
Timothy my son, I entrust this charge to you according to the prophecies that were spoken about you previously, so that you may use those prophecies to fight in the good warfare
Holding firmly to faith and a good conscience, which some have rejected, and their faith has been wrecked like a ship
Among them are Hymenaeus and Alexander, whom I have handed over to Satan, so that they may learn not to blaspheme
